title: READY SET CONNECT - 211info
text: UPSTREAM ACCESS READY SET CONNECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides monthly live, cross-disability virtual training's on emergency preparedness, resources, and supplies to support resilience for people with disabilities in emergencies. Eligibility: Individuals with disabilities Hours: 1st Tuesday of the month Email (971) 241-5339 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 241-5339 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, American Sign Language AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Emergency Preparedness and Response Planning * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
